case_title: YOUNG, JR., CARLOS A. vs. MARTINEZ, EDUARDO IND & DBA EDUARDO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, JR., CARLOS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EDUARDO IND & DBA EDUARDO MARTINEZ DESIGN ASSOCIATES $3,174.60 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,254.60

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,429.08 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EDUARDO IND & DBA EDUARDO MARTINEZ DESIGN ASSOCIATES
